title: polygala mathusiana
intro: Polygala mathusiana, also known as Running Foxglove or Polygala, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. It is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
